pokemonNotFound: Pokemon with this name/ID not found.

chatbot.title: Ash
chatbot.welcome:
🤖 Hi! I'm your AI Pokémon assistant. Ask me anything about Pokémon!

E.g. "Show me Pikachu", "Compare Charmander and Squirtle" or "Give me a random Pokémon!"
chatbot.ollamaNotReachable:
⚠️ Ollama is not reachable!

Please start Ollama locally:
1. Install Ollama: https://ollama.com
2. Terminal: ollama pull llama3.2
3. Terminal: ollama serve

Then reopen the chat.
chatbot.communicationError: ❌ Error communicating with Ollama. Is `ollama serve` running?
chatbot.pokemonDataNotLoaded: ❌ Unfortunately, I couldn't load the Pokémon data.
chatbot.pokemonContextPrompt:
Here are the Pokémon data I found. Please summarize the key info briefly and enthusiastically (DO NOT use [SEARCH:...] tags anymore!):

{{context}}
